top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Reference documents for The Customs (Reliefs from a Liability to Import Duty and Miscellaneous Amendments) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020
top_signals.summary: Find the documents for details of the conditions in which a 'good' may be eligible for a relief from the standard tariff rate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Reference Documents for The Customs (Tariff Quotas) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020
top_signals.summary: Check the documents that detail product specific tariff-rate quotas, including the individual product volumes and rates, and also list of eligible goods and their authorised uses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Advance as Indexes Head for Best Quarter Since 2020
top_signals.summary: US stocks advanced on Tuesday as the main indexes zeroed in on their best quarter in six years and traders parsed the latest economic data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Indonesia's Gojek co-founder Nadiem Makarim jailed for 10 years for graft
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: OKX AI unveils marketplace for agents to find work and get paid in stablecoins
top_signals.summary: “Think Upwork for Agents with our fintech infrastructure and 150M scale in the background," an OKX rep said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CISA: Windows BlueHammer flaw now exploited by ransomware gangs
top_signals.summary: CISA confirmed on Monday that ransomware gangs are now exploiting a Microsoft Defender privilege escalation vulnerability, dubbed BlueHammer, that has previously been abused in zero-day attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Reference document for authorised use: eligible goods and authorised uses
top_signals.summary: List of eligible goods and their authorised uses.

top_signals.title: Lloyds accused of debanking left-wing media outlet Canary
top_signals.summary: Lloyds Banking Group has been accused of debanking the left-wing news website The Canary in a move that has left the media outlet with “barely any funds”. The bank was slammed by the media firm on Tuesday for allegedly “withholding a substantial amount of our money” and debanking them after nearly a decade of use. [...]
